title: Mercury Glass Tea Light Holder Antique Gold Candle Votive Wedding Decoration
features: This antique vintage style tea light holder will be a welcome addition to any home or wedding venue
Tea lights are made of glass with a beautiful golden pattern on them, so that when the tea light is lit inside, it shines and shines
Use this as a pretty accessory in a vintage themed wedding
This holder could be filled with tea light or small sweets and given to guests as a fabulous wedding
Dimensions: Height 6.5 cm x Diameter 5.5 cm at the top, 4.5 cm at the bottom.
description: This vintage antique style tea lamp holder will be a welcome addition to any home or wedding place. Tea lights are made of glass with a beautiful golden pattern on them, so when the tea light is lit inside, it shines and shines. Use this as a pretty accessory in a vintage themed wedding. This holder could be filled with tea light or small sweets and given to guests as a fabulous wedding. NB The tea light candle in the picture is not supplied with the holder. We also sell a silver version. Please check our Amazon store for a separate list.
